result.instructions: HANA MCP Server is connected to a SAP HANA database and exposes tools for configuration, schema exploration, SQL execution, and optional business semantics. Before using the tools, ensure HANA_HOST, HANA_USER, HANA_PASSWORD and (for MDC tenants) HANA_DATABASE_NAME are configured in the server environment. Use hana_show_config, hana_test_connection, and hana_show_env_vars to inspect configuration and connectivity before running queries. hana_execute_query wraps SELECT/WITH statements with LIMIT/OFFSET (see HANA_MAX_RESULT_ROWS). structuredContent reports truncated, nextOffset, and optional snapshotId for hana_query_next_page. hana_list_schemas and hana_list_tables support prefix, limit, and offset; defaults and caps use HANA_LIST_DEFAULT_LIMIT. hana_describe_table, hana_explain_table, hana_list_indexes, and hana_describe_index accept optional catalog_database (or HANA_METADATA_CATALOG_DATABASE) to read SYS.* metadata from another MDC database (e.g. HSP) when connected to a different tenant. hana_explain_table merges SYS.TABLE_COLUMNS with optional JSON from HANA_SEMANTICS_PATH or HANA_SEMANTICS_URL. Resource reads for hana:///schemas and hana:///schemas/{schema} cap embedded lists (HANA_RESOURCE_LIST_MAX_ITEMS) and set truncated when applicable.

serverInfo.description: Model Context Protocol server for SAP HANA databases
serverInfo.name: hana-mcp-server
serverInfo.title: HANA MCP Server

tools.description: Show the HANA database configuration
tools.name: hana_show_config
tools.title: Show HANA configuration

tools.description: Test connection to HANA database
tools.name: hana_test_connection
tools.title: Test HANA connection

tools.description: List schemas in the HANA database with optional prefix filter and pagination (HANA_LIST_DEFAULT_LIMIT / offset).

limit.description: Max schemas to return (capped by server)

prefix.description: Optional case-sensitive prefix filter (SQL LIKE prefix%)

tools.name: hana_list_schemas
tools.title: List HANA schemas

tools.description: Show all HANA-related environment variables (for debugging)
tools.name: hana_show_env_vars
tools.title: Show HANA env vars

tools.description: List tables in a schema with optional name prefix and pagination (HANA_LIST_DEFAULT_LIMIT / offset).

catalog_database.description: Optional HANA database name whose SYS.TABLES catalog to read (MDC cross-tenant). Omit for connected DB. Overrides HANA_METADATA_CATALOG_DATABASE when set.

limit.description: Max tables to return (capped by server)

prefix.description: Optional table name prefix filter (SQL LIKE prefix%)

schema_name.description: Name of the schema to list tables from (optional)

tools.name: hana_list_tables
tools.title: List tables in schema

tools.description: Describe the structure of a specific table

catalog_database.description: Optional HANA database for SYS.TABLE_COLUMNS (e.g. HSP when connected to another tenant). Overrides HANA_METADATA_CATALOG_DATABASE when set.

schema_name.description: Name of the schema containing the table (optional)

table_name.description: Name of the table to describe

tools.name: hana_describe_table
tools.title: Describe table structure

tools.description: Return column metadata merged with optional business semantics from HANA_SEMANTICS_PATH or HANA_SEMANTICS_URL (JSON keys: SCHEMA.TABLE or DB.SCHEMA.TABLE when catalog_database is set). Optional catalog_database reads SYS.* from another MDC database (e.g. HSP).

catalog_database.description: Optional HANA database for SYS.TABLE_COLUMNS (MDC cross-tenant). Overrides HANA_METADATA_CATALOG_DATABASE when set.

schema_name.description: Schema containing the table (optional if HANA_SCHEMA is set)

tools.name: hana_explain_table
tools.title: Explain table with business semantics

tools.description: List all indexes for a specific table

catalog_database.description: Optional HANA database for SYS.INDEXES / SYS.INDEX_COLUMNS (MDC). Overrides HANA_METADATA_CATALOG_DATABASE when set.

schema_name.description: Name of the schema containing the table (optional)

table_name.description: Name of the table to list indexes for

tools.name: hana_list_indexes
tools.title: List table indexes

tools.description: Describe the structure of a specific index

catalog_database.description: Optional HANA database for SYS.INDEXES / SYS.INDEX_COLUMNS (MDC). Overrides HANA_METADATA_CATALOG_DATABASE when set.

index_name.description: Name of the index to describe

schema_name.description: Name of the schema containing the table (optional)

table_name.description: Name of the table containing the index

tools.name: hana_describe_index
tools.title: Describe table index

tools.description: Execute SQL against HANA. When HANA_QUERY_LIMITS_ENABLED=true, SELECT/WITH queries are wrapped with LIMIT/OFFSET (HANA_MAX_RESULT_ROWS) and row/column/cell caps apply; results are returned as-is otherwise. INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE are blocked by default; set HANA_ALLOW_INSERT, HANA_ALLOW_UPDATE, HANA_ALLOW_DELETE=true individually to permit each. Use limit, offset, maxRows, includeTotal as needed. If truncated, snapshotId may be returned for hana_query_next_page.

includeTotal.description: If true, run COUNT(*) on the same SELECT subquery (extra cost). Only for SELECT/WITH.

limit.description: Deprecated alias for maxRows; prefer maxRows

maxRows.description: Max data rows to return this page (capped by HANA_MAX_RESULT_ROWS)

offset.description: Row offset for paged reads (SELECT/WITH only)

parameters.description: Optional parameters for the query (for prepared statements)

timeout_ms.description: Query timeout in milliseconds. 0 or omitted uses HANA_QUERY_TIMEOUT_MS (default 0 = disabled).

tools.name: hana_execute_query
tools.title: Execute SQL query

tools.description: Fetch the next page of a truncated SELECT using snapshotId from a previous hana_execute_query result (same SQL and parameters; TTL HANA_QUERY_SNAPSHOT_TTL_MS).

max_rows.description: Optional page size override (capped by server)

offset.description: Offset for this page (usually prior nextOffset)

snapshot_id.description: snapshotId from structuredContent of a truncated query result

tools.name: hana_query_next_page
tools.title: Continue paged query

tools.description: List primary key, unique, check, and foreign key constraints for a table (SYS.CONSTRAINTS + SYS.REFERENTIAL_CONSTRAINTS).

catalog_database.description: MDC catalog database for SYS.* (overrides HANA_METADATA_CATALOG_DATABASE)

tools.name: hana_list_constraints
tools.title: List table constraints

tools.description: Return row count, table type, column-store flag, primary key flag, and disk size (requires MONITORING privilege for disk size) from SYS.TABLES and SYS.M_TABLE_SIZES.
tools.name: hana_get_table_stats
tools.title: Get table statistics

tools.description: List views in a schema from SYS.VIEWS. Supports prefix filter and pagination.
tools.name: hana_list_views
tools.title: List views in a schema

tools.description: Return the view definition (SQL) and column metadata from SYS.VIEWS and SYS.VIEW_COLUMNS.
tools.name: hana_describe_view
tools.title: Describe a view

tools.description: List synonyms in a schema from SYS.SYNONYMS, showing target object schema, name, and type.
tools.name: hana_list_synonyms
tools.title: List synonyms in a schema

tools.description: List stored procedures and their parameter counts from SYS.PROCEDURES.
tools.name: hana_list_procedures
tools.title: List stored procedures in a schema

tools.description: Return parameter names, types (IN/OUT/INOUT), data types, and positions from SYS.PROCEDURE_PARAMETERS.
tools.name: hana_describe_procedure
tools.title: Describe a stored procedure

tools.description: Find all columns matching a LIKE pattern across all tables (or within a schema). Uses SYS.TABLE_COLUMNS. Results capped at 1000.
tools.name: hana_search_columns
tools.title: Search columns by name pattern

tools.description: Fetch the first N rows from a table using SELECT TOP. Result is shaped by the same row/column/cell caps as hana_execute_query.
tools.name: hana_get_sample_data
tools.title: Get sample rows from a table

tools.description: Run EXPLAIN PLAN for a SELECT/WITH query and return operator tree from EXPLAIN_PLAN_TABLE. Only SELECT/WITH are accepted.

query.description: SELECT or WITH query to explain (must not contain DML/DDL)

tools.name: hana_explain_plan
tools.title: Explain query execution plan

tools.description: List referential constraints (foreign keys) showing column, referenced table/column, and delete rule from SYS.REFERENTIAL_CONSTRAINTS.
tools.name: hana_list_foreign_keys
tools.title: List foreign keys on a table

tools.description: List effective privileges for a user (or CURRENT_USER if omitted) from SYS.EFFECTIVE_PRIVILEGES. Requires CATALOG READ privilege or querying own privileges.

grantee.description: Database user to query. Omit for current user.

tools.name: hana_list_privileges
tools.title: List effective privileges

tools.description: Retrieve the DDL (CREATE statement) for a TABLE, VIEW, PROCEDURE, FUNCTION, TRIGGER, or SEQUENCE from SYS.OBJECT_DEFINITION. Requires appropriate privileges.

object_type.description: Optional filter: TABLE, VIEW, PROCEDURE, FUNCTION, TRIGGER, SEQUENCE

tools.name: hana_get_ddl
tools.title: Get object DDL definition

tools.description: Retrieve column statistics (distinct count, null count, min/max) from SYS.COLUMN_STATISTICS (cached) or via live COUNT queries (live=true). With live=true a specific column_name is required.

column_name.description: Optional: single column to inspect. Required when live=true.

live.description: If true, run live COUNT(*)/COUNT(DISTINCT) queries instead of reading SYS.COLUMN_STATISTICS.

tools.name: hana_get_column_stats
tools.title: Get column statistics

tools.description: List scalar and table functions from SYS.FUNCTIONS. Supports prefix filter and pagination.
tools.name: hana_list_functions
tools.title: List functions in a schema

tools.description: Return parameter names, types, data types, and positions for a function from SYS.FUNCTION_PARAMETERS.
tools.name: hana_describe_function
tools.title: Describe a function

tools.description: List calculation views from the _SYS_BIC schema (SAP BW/S4 analytical views). Supports prefix filter and pagination.
tools.name: hana_list_calculation_views
tools.title: List SAP calculation views

tools.description: Return CURRENT_USER, CURRENT_SCHEMA, connected database name, SYSTEM_ID, and HANA version from DUMMY and M_DATABASE.
tools.name: hana_get_session_info
tools.title: Get current session info

tools.description: Find all tables matching a LIKE pattern across all schemas (or within a specific schema). Uses SYS.TABLES. Results capped at 2000.
tools.name: hana_search_tables
tools.title: Search tables by name pattern

tools.description: Return the most expensive statements from M_EXPENSIVE_STATEMENTS ordered by duration. Requires MONITORING privilege.

limit.description: Number of statements to return (default 20, max 100)

tools.name: hana_get_expensive_queries
tools.title: Get top expensive queries

tools.description: Show what an object depends on or what depends on it, from SYS.OBJECT_DEPENDENCIES. Capped at 200 rows.

direction.description: base (what this depends on), dependent (what depends on this), both (default)

tools.name: hana_get_dependencies
tools.title: Get object dependencies

tools.description: Return partition metadata (type, level, record count, loaded state) from SYS.TABLE_PARTITIONS. Returns empty result for unpartitioned tables.
tools.name: hana_get_partition_info
tools.title: Get table partition info

tools.description: List sequences from SYS.SEQUENCES, showing start, min, max, increment, cycle, and cache settings.
tools.name: hana_list_sequences
tools.title: List sequences in a schema
